user.title: Choose LLM Provider
user.description: Select your AI backend. Ollama (local, free) is the default. Cloud providers require an API key.

connection.title: Connection Settings
connection.description: Enter the host URL and API key (if required) for your LLM provider.

model.title: Choose Model
model.description: Select a vision model and the analysis interval.

spoiler.title: Spoiler Settings
spoiler.description: Choose a default spoiler level. This applies to all categories. You can fine-tune per category and game later via the spoiler level entity or the set_spoiler_level service.

camera.title: Camera Setup
camera.description: Optionally select a Home Assistant camera to auto-monitor for game screenshots. You can skip this if you use an external worker (PC/Android app). Workers that connect via MQTT will be registered automatically.

tts.title: Voice Announcements
tts.description: Optionally configure text-to-speech to have tips read aloud. Select a TTS engine (e.g. Piper) and a speaker (media player). You can also enable auto-announce to speak every new tip automatically.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the LLM server – please check the URL.
error.api_key_required: An API key is required for this cloud provider.
